positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of interconnected celestial and natural elements, featuring a central crescent moon nestled within an overgrown labyrinth of blooming bioluminescent flowers and delicate roots. The composition must be perfectly centered, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast. Use an intricate, engraved woodcut or linocut etching style. The color palette should be restricted to deep indigo, burnt gold, cream white, and forest green, creating a limited but powerful color block effect. The overall mood is mystical, serene, and elegant. Focus on graphic impact, sharp linework, and clear delineation between subjects. Intricate detailing but always maintaining a clean, scalable aesthetic.
negative: blur, grainy, photograph, photorealistic, noise, text, watermark, signatures, logo, border, excessive detail, soft focus, low resolution, artifacts, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, cartoon, childish, messy
